title: Fix Top Navigation Spacing and Reports Label
story: As a DataTools Pro user, I want the top navigation to have consistent spacing and clear labels, so that the navigation is easy to read and visually balanced.
description:
Two updates to the top navigation bar:

1. **Label rename**: Changed "Reports/dashboards" to "Reports & Dashboards" for cleaner formatting
2. **Column width**: Adjusted navigation column widths for better spacing and visual balance
acceptance_criteria: Navigation label reads 'Reports & Dashboards' instead of 'Reports/dashboards'
Navigation column widths are adjusted for balanced spacing
Navigation layout is visually consistent across all pages
ux_changes: Renamed 'Reports/dashboards' to 'Reports & Dashboards' in the top navigation. Adjusted column widths for improved spacing.
comment_summary: Developer deployed to staging. No issues reported.
